title: thisantha debilis var. minutiflora
side_effects: Thisantha debilis var. minutiflora can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high saponin content. Ingesting large amounts can also cause headaches, dizziness, and fatigue in some individuals. Additionally, improper use of this plant may lead to allergic reactions, such as skin irritation, itching, and respiratory issues in rare cases. Prolonged use without proper guidance can also interact with certain medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
